name: Kyūden Ikoma
text: Reaction: After a character you control loses a conflict as an attacker, bow this stronghold. Choose a non-Champion character – bow that character.

name: Kenson no Gakka
text: Reaction: After you lose a conflict at this province – honor each defending character.

name: Support of the Lion
text: Increase your deckbuilding influence value by 8. You may only spend influence on  clan cards.

name: Ashigaru Levy
text: Reaction: After this character enters play, choose another copy of this card in your provinces or discard pile – put that character into play.

name: Matsu Gohei
text: This character does not bow as the result of conflict resolution during conflicts in which it is attacking with 2 or more other Bushi characters.

name: Ardent Omoidasu
text: Reaction: After an opponent's card ability or ring effect dishonors a character you control – take 2 honor from that opponent.

name: Kitsu Motso
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, if you have fewer cards in your hand than your opponent, choose a character that opponent controls – move that character to the conflict.

name: Akodo Motivator
text: Reaction: After an opponent's card ability or ring effect discards 1 or more cards from your hand – that opponent discards an equal number of cards at random from his or her hand.

name: Voice of the Ancestors
text: Action: Choose a character you control – play a  character from your dynasty discard pile as an attachment on the chosen character, reducing its cost by 1. Treat this attachment as if its printed text box were blank. It gains the Spirit trait and the text: "Limit 1 Spirit per character. Add this card's printed [mil] and [pol] skill values to those of attached character."

name: Matsu Tsuko
text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict as the attacker against a non-stronghold province, if you are more honorable than your opponent – break the attacked province.

name: Champions of Yomi
text:
No attachments except Spirit.
Reaction: After a character you control loses a conflict as an attacker, bow your stronghold – put this character into play from your dynasty discard pile. If it is in play at the end of the phase, remove it from the game.

name: Hall of Victories
text: Forced Reaction: After a player wins a conflict – that player gains 1 honor. (Unlimited.)

name: Yasuki Hikaru
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is defending, choose an attacking character with higher [mil] skill than this character – move the chosen character home.

name: Doji Kuzunobu
text: While this character is participating in a conflict, players cannot trigger reaction abilities.

name: Isawa Tsuke
text: Reaction: After you honor or dishonor a character by the effect of the [fire] ring – each other character with the same printed cost as the chosen character controlled by the same player receives the same ring effect as the character.

name: Shosuro Denmaru
text: Each honored character controlled by an opponent has a base glory of 0.

name: Moto Ariq
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, if your opponent is more honorable than you, he or she must choose a ready character he or she controls – move that character to the conflict.

name: Caravan Guard
text:
Keeper role only.
This character cannot be declared as an attacker unless you spend 1 fate.

name: Insolent Outcast
text:
Seeker role only.
This character gets +1[mil] and +1[pol] for each honored character an opponent controls.

name: Tactical Ingenuity
text:
Attach to a Commander character.
Attached character gains: "Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating – search the top 4 cards of your conflict deck for an event, reveal it, and add it to your hand. Shuffle."

name: Total Warfare
text:
Attach to an unbroken province. Limit 1 Battlefield attachment per province.
Forced Reaction: After a player loses a conflict at attached province – that player must sacrifice a participating character.

name: Embrace Death
text: Reaction: After a Bushi character you control loses a conflict as the attacker, sacrifice it. Choose a character controlled by your opponent – if that character has no fate on it, discard it. Otherwise, remove 1 fate from it.

name: Honor in Battle
text: Action: If you have claimed a [mil] ring, choose a character – honor that character.

name: Prepare for War
text: Action: Choose a character you control – you may discard any number of attachments and/or status tokens from it. Then, if that character is a Commander, honor it.

name: Right Hand of the Emperor
text:
If you are more honorable than an opponent, you can play this card from your discard pile.
Action: Choose up to 6 printed cost worth of Bushi characters you control – ready each of those characters. Put this card on the bottom of its owner's conflict deck.

name: Kitsuki Kāgi
text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose up to 3 cards in a player's discard pile – remove them from the game.

name: Those Who Serve
text:
Limited. (No more than one limited card can be played by each player each round.)
Action: During the dynasty phase – reduce the cost to play each character you play this phase by 1 (to a minimum of 1).
